# Brentwood Organizers

> White-glove home organization for Miami's most discerning homes. Expert move-in organizing, senior downsizing, closet organization, and estate transition services across South Florida.

Brentwood Organizers is a professional home organization company based in Miami, FL. The site is a static HTML site hosted on GitHub Pages with translations in English, French, and Spanish.

## Business

- [Home](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/index.html): Overview of the company, services, and approach
- [Services](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/services.html): Full list of services offered
- [Reviews](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/reviews.html): Client testimonials and reviews
- [FAQ](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/faqs/index.html): Frequently asked questions about services, pricing, and process
- [Consultation](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/consultation.html): Request a consultation

## Services

- [Move-In Organization](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/luxury-move-in.html): White-glove move-in setup and unpacking for luxury homes and high-rises
- [Home Organization](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/home-organization.html): Systems for closets, pantries, kitchens, and everyday living spaces
- [Estate Transitions](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/estate-transitions.html): Compassionate downsizing and estate transition support for seniors

## Locations

- [Locations Overview](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/locations.html): All service areas listed
- [Bal Harbour](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/bal-harbour.html)
- [Boca Raton](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/boca-raton.html)
- [Brickell](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/brickell.html)
- [Coral Gables](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/coral-gables.html)
- [Fort Lauderdale](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/fort-lauderdale.html)
- [Miami Springs](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/miami-springs.html)
- [Pembroke Pines](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/pembroke-pines.html)
- [West Palm Beach](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/west-palm-beach.html)

## Translations

- [French](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/fr/): Full French translation of all pages
- [Spanish](https://www.brentwoodorganizers.com/es/): Full Spanish translation of all pages

## Technical

- Static HTML site hosted on GitHub Pages
- Schema.org markup: LocalBusiness, Article, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList
- robots.txt and sitemap.xml at root
- Contact: +1 (424) 394-0619, rhode@brentwoodorganizers.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brentwoodorganizers/
